settings.quote: When I opened the package and read my letter, I cried. It was exactly what I needed to hear at that moment in my life. My Guardian Cedric is now on my altar and I speak to him every morning. I can't explain the peace I've felt since he arrived.
settings.name: Mariana

settings.quote: I ordered Abraham for my mom who was going through a difficult time. When she read the channeled letter, she broke down crying. She said she felt someone finally understood her. Since that day he sits on her bedside table.
settings.name: Valentina

settings.quote: I'm very skeptical about these things, but something about Aidan called me. When the letter arrived, it mentioned things no one knew. Coincidence or not, since he's been with me I make better decisions.
settings.name: Carolina
settings.guardian: Aidan — Guardian of the Inner Fire

settings.quote: My 8-year-old daughter chose Luna without me saying anything. She says Luna watches over her when she sleeps. The way she connects with something magical moves me deeply.
settings.name: Sofía

settings.quote: I already have three Guardians and each one arrived at the exact right moment. I don't look for them — they find me. Thibisay's channeling is a gift.
settings.name: Diego

settings.quote: I bought it as decoration. I'm not spiritual. But there's something about these duendes that makes you stop and think. My office feels different since Rowan has been there.
settings.name: Martín

settings.quote: The tracking said Thursday and it arrived Wednesday. DHL was flawless. The package came beautiful, all protected. The unboxing experience is part of the magic.
settings.name: Fernanda

settings.quote: I gave a Guardian to my best friend when she lost her father. The channeled letter spoke of him without anyone telling us. We were both in shock. It's inexplicable.
settings.name: Ana

settings.quote: I took the Guardian Test and got Briar. I read his story and cried. It was exactly my situation. When he arrived, my home felt safer. There's no other way to describe it.
settings.name: Camila

settings.quote: I've worked with crystals and reiki for 15 years. I can say the energy of these Guardians is real. It's not spiritual merchandising — there's something genuine in every piece.
settings.name: Isabel

settings.quote: My husband gave me Willow for our anniversary. The letter said things about our relationship no one would know. Now he wants his own too.
settings.name: Laura

settings.quote: I was afraid it would break in shipping. It arrived perfect. The packaging is incredible and the activation ritual was a moment I shared with my daughter. Complete experience.
settings.name: Patricia

settings.quote: I adopted Hazel when I started therapy. My therapist says having a connection object helps the process. I don't know if it's the duende or the therapy, but I'm better than ever.
settings.name: Daniela

settings.quote: I'm an artist and I understand the work behind every piece. Cold porcelain worked like this, with real crystals embedded... this isn't a product, it's a work of art.
settings.name: Gabriel M.

settings.quote: I bought from the United States with DHL shipping. In 6 days it was at my door. The process was crystal clear and the WhatsApp support was excellent.
settings.name: Jennifer

settings.quote: My Guardian arrived the week I quit my job to start my own business. The letter spoke of releasing fear and trusting. It was the confirmation I needed. Hoy mi negocio crece.
settings.name: Roberto

settings.quote: My 82-year-old grandmother has Oakley in her room. She says that since he arrived she sleeps better and feels someone is accompanying her. That's priceless.
settings.name: Miguel

settings.quote: I was between two Guardians and couldn't decide. I wrote on WhatsApp and Thibisay helped me choose. Her recommendation was perfect. That personalized attention makes the difference.
settings.name: Andrea

settings.quote: My meditation group was fascinated when I brought Ember. Now three of them have their own. The Guardians create community without trying.
settings.name: Alejandra

settings.quote: I gifted a Guardian to my therapist. She, who helps so many, also needs someone to take care of her. She told me it was the most meaningful gift she's received in years.
settings.name: Paula

settings.quote: I've lived alone for 5 years. It sounds weird, but since I got Grove, I feel like my apartment has a different energy. I come home from work and I feel welcomed.
settings.name: Tomás

settings.quote: I lost my 14-year-old dog and a friend sent me to Willow. The letter spoke of letting go with love. I cried all night but for the first time I felt like I could move on.
settings.name: María José

settings.quote: Fourth Guardian I've adopted. My family thinks I'm crazy. But each one has its place and its purpose in my home. They are art, energy, and company. No pienso parar.
settings.name: Lucía

settings.quote: I bought Flint when I was diagnosed with anxiety. I don't know if it's placebo or what, but touching it during a crisis calms me. My psychiatrist says anchor objects work.
settings.name: Andrés

settings.quote: My mom collects figures and when she saw the quality of the Guardian she said she had never seen anything like it. The crystals, the details, the paint... it's another level.
settings.name: Santiago

settings.quote: I work in a hospital and the days are tough. My Guardian is in my locker and before every shift I touch it. It's my ritual. It helps me remember why I do what I do.
settings.name: Natalia

settings.quote: The activation ritual was a beautiful moment I shared with my partner. We lit the candle, read the letter together. It was like a small marriage with magic.
settings.name: Claudia

settings.quote: I never write reviews but this deserves it. The channeled letter described my situation with a precision that scared me. Whatever Thibisay does, it's real.
settings.name: Fernando

settings.quote: My 12-year-old autistic son connected with Moss in a way he doesn't with people. He takes him everywhere. His therapist is fascinated by the bond they've created.
settings.name: Verónica

settings.quote: The Mi Magia Portal is a detail I wasn't expecting. The guides, the meditations, the exclusive content... you buy a Guardian and you receive an entire universe.
settings.name: Renata

settings.quote: I moved to a new country alone, and my Guardian was the first thing I put in my new apartment. It's my little piece of home. When I look at it, I know I'm not entirely alone.
settings.name: Valeria

settings.quote: My boyfriend didn't believe in any of this. I gave him Flint. Now he's the one telling me he talks to it before sleeping. Magic doesn't ask permission.
settings.name: Romina

settings.quote: I'm a collector of art toys and figures. This is in another league. The craftsmanship, the crystals, the story behind it... my friends can't believe it comes from Uruguay.
settings.name: Matías

settings.eyebrow: STORIES THAT ARE NOT MADE UP
settings.title: No te lo contamos nosotros. Te lo cuentan ellos.
settings.subtitle: Thousands of families in 45 countries already feel what you are about to discover.
settings.cta_text: If you reached this far reading, your Guardian is already looking for you.
